title: An uneasy feeling
overview: Jackpot! Rilakkuma wins free tickets to Nakasugi Land, the local amusement park that will soon be closing its doors forever.

title: Game battle with Emiri
overview: Rilakkuma has lots of fun playing video games with a new friend, but the big fuzzy bear gets a little dizzy after playing too much. Next stop: teacups!

title: Eiji and the jungle tour
overview: Kiiroitori ends up getting stuck in a tree. Can Rilakkuma and friends rescue the little bird? Kaoru and Korilakkuma finally make it into the park.

title: Clown in love
overview: It's way past lunchtime and everyone's getting hungry. Kaoru and Korilakkuma need to get their bentos back from the clown who ran off with them quick!

title: Suzune’s an idol
overview: Rilakkuma, Tokio and Kiiroitori are all really hungry; luckily, the park employee that's been helping them notices and kindly buys them lunch.

title: The secret of the theme park
overview: The park secret is out!? As the sun starts to set, Suzune remembers how much she used to love this job. At long last, it's time for her final concert.

title: Strategy meeting in the dark
overview: The power's out throughout the park and it's getting dark, but Kaoru starts beaming when she finally meets up with Hayate — and the rest of the crew.

title: The last parade
overview: There's only one way to get the power back on in time for the parade; Korilakkuma has to send her remote controlled ducky into the underground maze.
